name: Ramstein Air Base

name: Spangdahlem Air Base

name: USAG Grafenwöhr / Rose Barracks Vilseck

name: USAG Stuttgart (Patch Barracks)

name: Kelley Barracks Stuttgart

name: Robinson Barracks Stuttgart

name: Panzer Kaserne Böblingen

name: Lucius D. Clay Kaserne (Wiesbaden)

name: Dagger Complex (Darmstadt)

name: USAG Ansbach (Katterbach Kaserne)

name: Storck Barracks Illesheim

name: Rhine Ordnance Barracks Kaiserslautern

name: Sembach Kaserne

name: Germersheim Army Depot

name: Garmisch Military Community (Artillery Kaserne)
